title: monarda fistulosa f. media
intro: Monarda fistulosa f. media, also known as Bee Balm or Wild Bergamot, is a perennial herb that belongs to the mint family and is native to North America. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues, such as sore throats, coughs, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Monarda fistulosa f. media include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and supporting immune system health. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent, and can be used to promote relaxation, ease digestive issues, and boost overall well-being.
